name: intelthreadlinqs-mcp
description: 54 cyber-threat-intelligence tools — threats, SPL/KQL/Sigma detections, IOCs, actors, C2, MITRE ATT&CK. Purple tier.
long_description:
Threadlinqs Intelligence is a premium cyber-threat-intelligence MCP server. It exposes 54 tools across curated threats, detection logic (Splunk SPL / Microsoft KQL / Sigma), IOCs, threat actors, C2 infrastructure, MITRE ATT&CK chains, CVE/CWE, correlations, and Purple-tier composite/aggregation intelligence — plus prompts, resources (threadlinqs:// URIs), completions, and STIX 2.1 / ATT&CK Navigator export.

This is a **Purple-tier feature (tier >= 3, Purple + Gold plans)**. The server verifies your API key at startup and refuses to run without a valid Purple/Gold key — there is no free or anonymous mode. Get a key (or start a 7-day Purple trial) at https://intel.threadlinqs.com/profile.

Prefer zero-install? The same server is available as a remote connector at https://intel.threadlinqs.com/mcp (OAuth 2.1).

api_key.title: Threadlinqs API key (tl_…)
api_key.description: Your Purple or Gold API key from intel.threadlinqs.com → Profile → API. The MCP server is Purple-tier only (tier >= 3) and refuses to start without a valid Purple/Gold key. Stored in your OS keychain.
